metadata.description: Name of the existing Container Apps Environment (created in Session 3).
Azure region. Defaults to the Resource Group region.
Image tag for backend services. Comes from Build.BuildId in CD, or "latest" for local deploys.
GHCR username — package owner.
GHCR Personal Access Token with read:packages scope.
Migrator image reference, e.g. ghcr.io/sorokinartemv/kombats-migrator:42
Postgres password for the kombats superuser. Used by all backend services and as the bootstrap user for migrator.
Password for the keycloak DB user (created by migrator, used by Keycloak app).
Initial admin password for Keycloak master realm.
Allowed origins for BFF CORS. Use ["*"] for demo, specific domains for prod. Maps to Cors__AllowedOrigins__N env vars.
Storage Account name. Must be globally unique across Azure, lowercase, 3-24 chars, no dashes.
File Share name inside the Storage Account.
Azure region. Typically inherited from the Resource Group.
Name of the existing Container Apps Environment.
Logical name to register the storage under inside the environment. Container Apps reference this name in their volumes block.
Storage Account name (output from storage.bicep).
File Share name (output from storage.bicep).
Storage Account access key. Marked secure so its value is not logged or exposed in deployment history.
Container App name. Becomes the internal DNS hostname: <name>.internal.<env-domain>
Azure region.
Resource ID of the Container Apps Environment.
Public image reference, e.g. postgres:16-alpine. No registry credentials needed.
Port the stateful service listens on. 5432 for Postgres, 6379 for Redis, 5672 for RabbitMQ.
Whether to mount a persistent volume. False for demo (data lost on restart), true for prod with NFS-backed share.
Logical name of the registered storage in the Container Apps Environment. Required when usePersistentVolume=true.
Subpath inside the File Share where this service data lives. Required when usePersistentVolume=true.
Mount path inside the container. Required when usePersistentVolume=true.
Plain env vars. Array of { name, value }.
Secret env vars. Array of { name, value }. Same convention as backend-app.bicep: secret name "foo-bar" exposed as env FOO_BAR.
CPU allocation. Statefuls often want more than backend services.
Memory allocation. Must follow allowed CPU:memory ratios (1:2).
Container App name. Becomes the internal DNS hostname: <name>.internal.<env-domain>
Azure region.
Resource ID of the Container Apps Environment.
Public image reference, e.g. postgres:16-alpine. No registry credentials needed.
Port the stateful service listens on. 5432 for Postgres, 6379 for Redis, 5672 for RabbitMQ.
Whether to mount a persistent volume. False for demo (data lost on restart), true for prod with NFS-backed share.
Logical name of the registered storage in the Container Apps Environment. Required when usePersistentVolume=true.
Subpath inside the File Share where this service data lives. Required when usePersistentVolume=true.
Mount path inside the container. Required when usePersistentVolume=true.
Plain env vars. Array of { name, value }.
Secret env vars. Array of { name, value }. Same convention as backend-app.bicep: secret name "foo-bar" exposed as env FOO_BAR.
CPU allocation. Statefuls often want more than backend services.
Memory allocation. Must follow allowed CPU:memory ratios (1:2).
Container App name. Becomes the internal DNS hostname: <name>.internal.<env-domain>
Azure region.
Resource ID of the Container Apps Environment.
Public image reference, e.g. postgres:16-alpine. No registry credentials needed.
Port the stateful service listens on. 5432 for Postgres, 6379 for Redis, 5672 for RabbitMQ.
Whether to mount a persistent volume. False for demo (data lost on restart), true for prod with NFS-backed share.
Logical name of the registered storage in the Container Apps Environment. Required when usePersistentVolume=true.
Subpath inside the File Share where this service data lives. Required when usePersistentVolume=true.
Mount path inside the container. Required when usePersistentVolume=true.
Plain env vars. Array of { name, value }.
Secret env vars. Array of { name, value }. Same convention as backend-app.bicep: secret name "foo-bar" exposed as env FOO_BAR.
CPU allocation. Statefuls often want more than backend services.
Memory allocation. Must follow allowed CPU:memory ratios (1:2).
Container App name. Defaults to "keycloak". Becomes the public subdomain.
Azure region.
Resource ID of the Container Apps Environment.
Keycloak image. Use the Quarkus-based image, NOT the legacy jboss/keycloak.
Internal hostname of the Postgres Container App, e.g. postgres.internal.<env-domain>. No scheme, no port.
Postgres password for the keycloak DB user.
Initial admin password for the Keycloak master realm.
Logical name of the registered storage in the environment (output from env-storage.bicep). Used to mount realm.json.
Job name. Defaults to "migrator".
Azure region.
Resource ID of the Container Apps Environment.
Migrator image reference, e.g. ghcr.io/sorokinartemv/kombats-migrator:42
GHCR username.
GHCR Personal Access Token.
Internal hostname of Postgres, e.g. postgres.internal.<env-domain>. No scheme, no port.
Postgres superuser password (used to create the keycloak database and user).
Password for the keycloak DB user (created by the migrator and used by the Keycloak app).

envVars.value: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'ConnectionStrings__Postgres', 'value', format('Host={0};Port=5432;Database=kombats;Username=kombats;', variables('postgresHost'))), createObject('name', 'ConnectionStrings__Redis', 'value', format('{0}:6379', variables('redisHost'))), createObject('name', 'ConnectionStrings__RabbitMQ', 'value', format('amqp://guest:guest@{0}:5672/', variables('rabbitmqHost'))), createObject('name', 'Authentication__Authority', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'deploy-keycloak'), '2025-04-01').outputs.issuerUrl.value)), variables('corsEnv'))]

metadata.description: Container App name. Becomes the subdomain in the FQDN: <name>.<env-domain>
Azure region.
Resource ID of the Container Apps Environment.
Full image reference with tag, e.g. ghcr.io/sorokinartemv/kombats-bff:42
External (public HTTPS URL) or internal (only reachable from inside the environment).
Port the container listens on. ASP.NET Core defaults to 8080.
GHCR username — owner of the package.
GHCR Personal Access Token with read:packages scope.
Plain (non-secret) environment variables for the container. Array of { name, value } objects.
Secret environment variables. Array of { name, value }. Each becomes a Container App secret and is exposed as an env var via secretRef.
